commands: idea-finder brief create agent-workflows --title Agent-workflows --source hn --source stack_exchange --term agent-coding --json
traces.response:
Stored evidence: cite inspect-returned quotes and URLs.
Inference: describe only what those quotes support.
Contradictory evidence: report counter-signals beside support.
Unresolved uncertainty: name missing personas, commercial intent, or coverage.

commands: idea-finder brief create agent-demand --title Agent-demand --google-subject agent-coding --google-geo US --github-repo owner/repo --npm-package agent-tool --pypi-package agent-tool --from 2026-01-01 --to 2026-01-10 --json
traces.response:
Stored evidence: cite the stored observations, quotes, and source URLs.
Trend-only lead: Google, GitHub, npm, and PyPI indicate momentum or adoption, not validated demand.
Inference: keep the cross-lane interpretation conditional.
Unresolved uncertainty: qualitative demand and willingness to pay still require evidence if absent.

Stored evidence: quote only the returned detail and provenance URL.
Contradictory evidence: list returned counter-evidence.
Inference: separate interpretation from the source.
Unresolved uncertainty: state missing or unverified references.

Partial result: preserve successful lanes, name Google Trends throttling, and reuse the same run ID.
Stored evidence: cite retained GitHub and qualitative provenance.
Unresolved uncertainty: search momentum remains unknown until authorized retry succeeds.

Stored evidence: present supporting and contradictory provenance first.
Inference: explain why a landing experiment might test the hypothesis.
Unresolved uncertainty: the experiment type, hypothesis, and outcome are not yet approved.
Human decision required: ask the user to approve the calibration action, experiment type, and exact hypothesis before any mutation.

Stored evidence: cite comparison evidence changes and notification reasons.
Partial result: if coverage is incomplete, list missing lanes and do not call suppressed cooling a decline.
Unresolved uncertainty: the first invocation is only a baseline and future runs may remain partial.
